inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace L
inst✝⁴ : IsNonarchimedeanLocalField L
inst✝³ : MulSemiringAction G L
inst✝² : Algebra K L
inst✝¹ : ValuativeExtension K L
inst✝ : IsGaloisGroup G K L
⊢ ShortComplex.ShortExact
    (IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.valuationShortComplex G K L inst✝¹¹ inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴
      inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝)

by
  classical
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · -- mono f
    intro x y h
    -- `f` is induced by `(ker_v L).toIntLinearMap`, which is injective
    -- since `ker_v_injective` in `IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.Valuation`
    simpa using (ker_v_injective (L := L) h)
  · -- exactness
    ext x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      -- use `ker_v_ker` in `IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.Valuation`
      simpa using (ker_v_ker (L := L) hx)
    · intro hx
      -- use `ker_v_ker` in `IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.Valuation`
      simpa using (ker_v_ker (L := L)).2 hx
  · -- epi g
    intro z
    -- use `v_surjective` in `IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.Valuation`
    simpa using (v_surjective (L := L) z)

by
  classical
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa [valuationShortComplex] using (ker_v_injective (L := L))
  · simpa [valuationShortComplex] using (ker_v_ker (L := L))
  · simpa [valuationShortComplex] using (v_surjective (L := L))

by
  dsimp [valuationShortComplex]
  refine ShortComplex.shortExact_mk ?_ ?_ ?_
  · simpa using (ker_v_injective (L := L))
  · simpa using (v_surjective (L := L))
  · simpa using (ker_v_ker (L := L))

by
  classical
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · -- mono f
    intro x y h
    ext
    exact ker_v_injective (L := L) (by
      simpa using congrArg (fun t => (t : Additive Lˣ →ₗ[ℤ] ℤ)) h)
  · -- exact f g
    ext x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      -- g (f x) = 0
      simpa using (valuationShortComplex (G := G) (K := K) (L := L)).zero x
    · intro hx
      -- x ∈ ker g → x ∈ range f
      rcases ker_v_ker (L := L) x with ⟨y, rfl⟩
      refine ⟨y, ?_⟩
      ext
      rfl
  · -- epi g
    intro z
    rcases v_surjective (L := L) z with ⟨x, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨x, rfl⟩

by
  constructor
  · -- mono f
    refine (ShortComplex.mono_iff_injective _).2 ?_
    intro x y hxy
    -- `ker_v L` is the kernel of the valuation, and its coercion is injective
    exact (ker_v_injective (L := L)) (by
      -- `toIntLinearMap` respects coercions; reduce to equality in `Lˣ`
      simpa using congrArg (fun t => (t : Additive Lˣ)) hxy)
  · constructor
    · -- exact f g
      refine (ShortComplex.exact_iff _).2 ?_
      intro x
      constructor
      · intro hx
        -- g (f x) = 0
        simpa using (congrArg (fun t => (t : AddCommGroupCat.of ℤ)) ((valuationShortComplex G K L).zero ▸ rfl))
      · intro hx
        -- if g x = 0 then x in image of f
        -- use `ker_v_ker` to identify kernel with units
        classical
        rcases (ker_v_ker (L := L) x) with ⟨y, rfl⟩
        refine ⟨y, ?_⟩
        rfl
    · -- epi g
      refine (ShortComplex.epi_iff_surjective _).2 ?_
      intro n
      classical
      rcases v_surjective (L := L) n with ⟨x, rfl⟩
      refine ⟨x, rfl⟩

  classical
  refine ShortComplex.shortExact_of_iso ?_ ?_ ?_
  · exact (valuationShortComplex G K L).zero
  ·
    intro x hx
    have : ((v L).toIntLinearMap) x = 0 := hx

  classical

  · -- `f` is injective

  · -- `f ≫ g = 0` and `ker g = range f`
    simpa [valuationShortComplex] using (ker_v_ker (L := L))
  · -- `g` is surjective
    simpa [valuationShortComplex] using (v_surjective (L := L))

by
  classical
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · -- mono f
    refine (ShortComplex.mono_iff_injective _).2 ?_
    intro x y hxy
    ext
    exact (ker_v_injective (L := L)) (by simpa using congrArg (fun f => f) hxy)
  · -- epi g
    refine (ShortComplex.epi_iff_surjective _).2 ?_
    intro n

  · -- exact
    refine ShortComplex.exact_of_isKernel ?_
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · intro x

      intro hx
      refine ⟨⟨x, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
      simpa using hx
    · intro y
      rfl

  · intro x hx
    simpa using hx

    -- exactness in the middle
    ext x

      -- `g x = 0` implies `x ∈ range f`

    intro z
